findings.title: Orphaned ActivationTestPage.tsx not removed
findings.issue: The standalone ActivationTestPage.tsx file still exists on disk even though its route was removed from App.tsx and its functionality was ported to the workspace ActivationPanel. This is dead code.
findings.suggestion: Delete ActivationTestPage.tsx in a follow-up cleanup. It has no imports pointing to it.
findings.impact: No runtime impact. Minor maintenance burden — new developers may be confused by the orphaned file.

scope.acsValidated: All tasks (9/9) verified complete per tasks.md

notes: Implementation is clean and well-structured. Type system properly extended with PanelId union. Reducer handles all activation states correctly. SSE wiring follows existing patterns. LeftRail grouped panels with separators and labels match the design spec. Mode badges in RunPanel use consistent color coding. Keyboard shortcuts correctly updated to Ctrl+1-6. The dangerouslySetInnerHTML in ActivationPanel uses renderMarkdown on server-fetched skill descriptions (not user input), acceptable risk for this context.
